title: Treasury yields are higher as investors await key inflation report
summary_full: U.S. Treasury yields moved higher on Wednesday as investors awaited February's inflation report and monitored developments on the US-Iran war front.
summary_public: U.S. Treasury yields moved higher on Wednesday as investors awaited February's inflation report and monitored developments on the US-Iran war front.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: monitored developments on the US-Iran war front.
